member_descriptions: dark wood bed with striped bedding
dark wooden bed with striped bedding
dark wooden bed with striped bedding
striped beige duvet on wooden frame
light gray striped pillow edge crop
member_long_descriptions: Dark mahogany wooden bed with tall paneled headboard and a light beige-and-gray horizontally striped duvet with two matching pillows; left side and lower front of the frame are partially cropped by the image edge, wood appears smooth and polished and the mattress surface is clearly visible (approx. 1.5 m from camera).

Rectangular beige/cream pillow with thin blue-gray horizontal stripes on a woven fabric surface, slightly wrinkled and horizontally oriented in a tight crop; appears to be a standard bed pillow photographed close up (approx. 0.6 m from camera).

Rectangular pillow with horizontal woven stripes in beige, tan and light-olive tones; soft, slightly wrinkled fabric surface, photographed in a close-up and partially cut off at the left edge (approx. 0.5 m from camera).

Foreground bed with a beige-gray striped duvet and visible mattress edge on a dark stained wooden frame; headboard and pillows are partially visible at the left, the right and top edges of the bed are cropped by the image, and a bedside table with a lamp and a window with blinds are visible behind it — approximate camera distance ~1.0 m.
Partial rectangular pillow with a striped gray, blue and beige cotton cover, visible at the lower-left edge of the crop and appearing slightly flattened; estimated ~0.5 m from the camera.

Partial rectangular pillow showing horizontal beige, light-blue and white stripes on a woven fabric, with a visible seam and slightly flattened soft profile; right edge of the pillow is cropped by the image and it appears close to the camera (approximately 0.5 m).

Partial view of a large bed with a dark mahogany paneled headboard and matching low wooden base, dressed in a beige-gray striped duvet and two matching striped pillows; left side and lower edge are cropped by the image frame and the bed appears approximately 1.5 meters from the camera.

Rectangular standard bed pillow with horizontal blue-gray and off-white thin stripes on a cotton-like fabric case; slightly wrinkled surface and partially edge-cropped on the left and right sides, appearing approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

Rectangular beige, tan and cream horizontally striped fabric pillow cushion, horizontally oriented and partially cropped at the right edge; appears to be soft woven material with slight wear and low-contrast, mildly blurred surface texture, approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Partial foreground view of a bed with a beige-gray horizontally striped bedspread and a visible dark wooden footboard along the lower edge; left pillow is partially visible at the top-left and the mattress/top surface is smooth and fabric-covered — the bed is edge-cropped in the image and appears approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Partial rectangular pillow (edge-cropped) shown close-up with horizontal narrow stripes in gray, blue and off-white on a woven cotton-like pillowcase; appears flattened/soft and photographed from about 0.4 m away.

Rectangular pillow with horizontal blue-gray and white striped fabric case, soft textile surface with light wrinkles; partially cropped at the image edge (bottom/left) and appears close to the camera (approximately 0.5 m).

Dark stained wooden bed with a tall paneled headboard and matching low frame, neatly made with beige-and-gray horizontal striped sheets and two matching pillows; the bed is partially edge-cropped in the image and appears photographed from close range (about 1.5 m).

Centered rectangular pillow with horizontal light-gray and off-white stripes, cotton-like fabric with slight wrinkles and visible seam, mostly visible and partly overlapped by bedding; appears close to the camera (approximately 0.6 m).

Partial rectangular pillow with beige and cream horizontal stripes in a woven fabric texture, appearing slightly flattened and cut off at the left edge of the crop; estimated distance about 0.6 m from the camera.

A large mattress covered with a beige-and-gray striped duvet on a dark stained wooden bed frame; the bed fills the foreground, has a smooth made surface with a pillow visible at the upper-left, and is partially edge-cropped at the right and bottom of the crop — camera approx. 1.2 m from the bed.

Partial rectangular pillow with light-gray and beige horizontal stripes in a woven fabric, edge-cropped at the lower-left of the image with small creases visible; appears close to the camera (approximately 0.5 m away).

Partial rectangular pillow with horizontal blue, gray and white stripes on a smooth woven pillowcase, edge-cropped on the right side of the image and lying flat on a bed surface; appears to be photographed from close range (approximately 0.6–0.8 m away).
clusters.representative_description: Rectangular beige/cream pillow with thin blue-gray horizontal stripes on a woven fabric surface, slightly wrinkled and horizontally oriented in a tight crop; appears to be a standard bed pillow photographed close up (approx. 0.6 m from camera).

member_long_descriptions: Dark mahogany wooden three-drawer nightstand with decorative molded edges, dark metal drawer pulls, and a rectangular top with small items; mostly visible in the crop and appears roughly 1.0 m from the camera.

Partial edge-cropped dark brown wooden nightstand top with a glossy veneer finish and beveled front edge; only the front corner and top surface are visible, showing minor surface scuffs and subtle reflections, approximately 0.7 m from the camera.

Dark-stained wooden dresser with a matte finish, multiple drawers with dark metal cup/pull handles and modest carved drawer fronts; left side is partially occluded by a bed in the foreground and the top surface holds small objects, appearing close to the camera (approx. 1.0 m) and mostly visible on the right side of the crop.

Close-up of a dark brown wooden dresser about 0.8 m from the camera showing the side panel and partial front with multiple stacked drawers and small metallic knobs; right edge is cropped and the finish appears slightly glossy and worn under low indoor lighting.

Front-facing dark brown stained wooden nightstand with three stacked drawers, molded drawer fronts and metal bail/drop handles; polished finish with visible wood grain, mostly fully visible in the crop and approximately 0.9 m from the camera.

Partial edge-cropped view of a dark brown, glossy wooden nightstand top with visible wood grain and a slight front overhang; small surface scuffs visible and a teal cushion rests near the upper-left—appears close to the camera (≈0.8 m).

Dark brown varnished wooden dresser with several horizontal drawers and dark metal handles in a traditional rectangular form; the front is partially occluded by the bed at the left and the crop cuts the object slightly at the edge — approximately 1.2 m from the camera.

Partial, close-up view of a dark brown wooden dresser showing the side panel and several drawer fronts with small metal knobs; surface appears slightly glossy and worn, cut off at the right edge, estimated ~0.6 m from the camera.

Dark reddish-brown varnished wooden nightstand with three stacked recessed-panel drawers, decorative top and base molding, and dark metal drop handles (single round knob on the top drawer); surface shows light wear and small items on the top. The piece is photographed from close range (approximately 0.9 m) and the full front face is visible in the crop.

Partial view of a dark brown, glossy wooden nightstand showing the top surface and front edge with visible wood grain and a beveled front lip; a teal fabric cushion sits on the upper-left corner, crop is edge-cut and shows only the top and part of the front face, approximate distance ~0.8 m from camera.

Dark stained wooden dresser with multiple horizontal drawers and metal drawer pulls, traditional molded trim and polished wood grain; the right-side of the piece is visible and edge-cropped in the image and the left portion is partially occluded by a bed in the foreground; appears to be roughly 1.5 meters from the camera.

Close-up of a dark brown wooden dresser showing the front drawer stack and the right-side edge; multiple horizontal drawer fronts with visible drawer pulls, a worn/scuffed finish, and the piece is cropped at the right edge (partial). Estimated distance ~0.8 meters from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Partial, close-up view of a dark brown wooden dresser showing the side panel and several drawer fronts with small metal knobs; surface appears slightly glossy and worn, cut off at the right edge, estimated ~0.6 m from the camera.

member_descriptions: beige shade lamp with twisted base
member_long_descriptions: Upright table lamp with a warm beige/tan tapered fabric shade trimmed with darker piping above a dark twisted wood (wood-finish) sculpted pedestal base; lamp appears lit and is centered and fully visible in the narrow portrait crop, approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Beige fabric (slightly pleated) lampshade on an ornate dark wood/bronze turned base; lamp is switched on with a warm yellow glow, casting light on the nearby surface; top-left of the shade is slightly cropped by the image border; approximate distance from camera ~0.6 m.

Tapered beige fabric shade with dark trim over a twisted dark bronze or wood-look column and square stepped base; lamp is lit and the lower base is slightly cropped at the bottom edge, approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Beige fabric shade table lamp emitting a warm yellow glow, with an ornate dark-brown turned base (wood or metal finish); bedside-scale object with the right edge of the shade slightly cropped by the image, estimated about 0.8 m from the camera.

Beige tapered fabric lampshade with dark trim sitting on a twisted dark-brown wood (or wood-look) column and a stepped square base; lamp is switched on and emitting warm light; object is mostly visible and centered in the crop; approximate distance ~0.8 m from camera.

Partial, edge-cropped table lamp about 0.7 m from the camera: tapered beige/off-white fabric shade lit with warm light (visible seams) sitting on a dark turned metal/bronze decorative stem and square wooden plinth base; shade shows a small irregular/tear-like edge on the left and the lamp is captured from a slightly low frontal angle.
clusters.representative_description: Beige tapered fabric lampshade with dark trim sitting on a twisted dark-brown wood (or wood-look) column and a stepped square base; lamp is switched on and emitting warm light; object is mostly visible and centered in the crop; approximate distance ~0.8 m from camera.

member_long_descriptions: Underside view of a ceiling-mounted fan with four medium-brown wooden blades and a central frosted glass dome light; metal/brass hardware visible around the light; the fan is partially edge-cropped in the image. Appears mounted at typical ceiling height, roughly 3.0 meters from the camera.

Partial ceiling fan with five glossy brown wooden blades, a central cream/opal glass dome light and visible metallic motor housing; blades are slightly curved and cropped by the image edges, the dome shows minor discoloration, and the crop appears low-resolution/compressed — estimated distance from camera ~3.0 m.

Overhead ceiling-mounted fan with multiple dark-stained wooden blades and a central frosted glass light shade (shows slight yellowish discoloration); metal mounting hardware visible; view from below and partly edge-cropped in the image; approximately 2.5 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Overhead ceiling-mounted fan with multiple dark-stained wooden blades and a central frosted glass light shade (shows slight yellowish discoloration); metal mounting hardware visible; view from below and partly edge-cropped in the image; approximately 2.5 m from the camera.

member_long_descriptions: Interior white-framed rectangular window fitted with closed white horizontal (venetian) blinds and flanked by dark navy curtains; blinds show a slight bend/tear near the lower-left and the bottom rail is visible, with diffused daylight filtering through the slat gaps — camera approximately 2.0 m away.

Interior rectangular window with a white frame and closed white horizontal slatted blinds filling the opening; dark navy curtains flank both sides and the lower-left blind slats are slightly misaligned with minor occlusion from a wooden piece of furniture at the bottom-left; approximate distance from camera ~2.0 m.

Interior rectangular white window with closed white horizontal blinds and a white painted frame, flanked by dark blue curtains; lower-left shows a partial wooden dresser obstructing the sill, and several slats are slightly misaligned near the bottom — camera appears approximately 2.0 meters away.
clusters.representative_description: Interior rectangular window with a white frame and closed white horizontal slatted blinds filling the opening; dark navy curtains flank both sides and the lower-left blind slats are slightly misaligned with minor occlusion from a wooden piece of furniture at the bottom-left; approximate distance from camera ~2.0 m.

member_long_descriptions: Partial, edge-cropped dark glossy flat-panel TV with a thin metallic bezel and reflective screen showing faint room reflections; appears large and wall-mounted, estimated distance ~2.0 m from camera.

Partial wall-mounted black flat-screen TV with a thin dark bezel and glossy reflective screen showing blurred vertical reflections; screen appears mostly dark/turned-off and the right edge is cropped by the image border — estimated ~1.5 m from the camera.

Partial right-edge crop of a large black flat-screen television with a thin bezel; the screen appears off and glossy with blurred interior reflections, mounted close to a light-colored wall — narrow vertical crop, slightly pixelated; estimated distance ~2.0 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Partial wall-mounted black flat-screen TV with a thin dark bezel and glossy reflective screen showing blurred vertical reflections; screen appears mostly dark/turned-off and the right edge is cropped by the image border — estimated ~1.5 m from the camera.
